Connect Notebook LM to OpenClaw: The Ultimate Free AI Setup

Learn how to integrate Notebook LM directly into OpenClaw to automate research, podcasts, and video content for free. This guide covers the setup process and the Lobster Brain framework for building a self-improving content engine.

00:00 - Intro: Notebook LM & OpenClaw
00:51 - How to Install the Integration
01:39 - Generating Content with AI Agents
03:24 - The Lobster Brain Content Framework
06:48 - Auto-Generating Podcasts & Infographics
10:36 - Why You Don't Need to Code
12:11 - Summary & 30-Day Automation Plan
